response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems, despite claiming C++ exposure from a 6-month role 10 years ago; his career has been overwhelmingly focused on web stacks (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) and consumer-facing apps, with no evidence of message brokers, IEC 62443, MQTT, multi-threaded C++ systems, or industrial IoT protocols required for the role.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background with diverse tech exposure
Proven experience in open-source contributions and technical mentoring
Demonstrated ability to deliver complex systems under tight constraints
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ work beyond academic/early-career projects
Absence of industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or OT protocol experience
Primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) mismatches core C++ requirements
